name: command-center-agent-signal
description: Writes command-center-agent-signal.json so Command Center can show thinking while your message is queued / agent is on-turn.

commands.title: Command Center: Mark agent turn active (test)
Command Center: Clear agent turn signal
Command Center: Toggle command logging (map Send/Stop IDs)
Command Center: Open command log file

commandCenterAgentSignal.logExecutedComm.markdownDescription: Log executed command ids to **Output → Command Center: command log**. Use this to find real Cursor ids for Send / Stop / cancel, then add them in `extension.ts`.

commandCenterAgentSignal.logOnlyLikelyCh.description: When logging, skip commands whose id does not look chat/agent-related (much less noise). Turn off to log every command.

commandCenterAgentSignal.completionComma.markdownDescription: Exact command ids that fire when an **AI reply finishes** (same moment as Cursor’s optional completion sound / `cursor.composer.shouldChimeAfterChatFinishes`). Enable **command logging**, run a full reply, copy the id that appears at finish into this list — Command Center uses `lastResponseCompletedAt` in `.cursor/command-center-agent-signal.json` (no audio).
